news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for ESSA Pharma investors with losses exceeding $50,000. Contact to discuss options.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $50,000 in ESSA Pharma to reach out to him directly for a discussion about potential options. The specified period for losses is between December 12, 2023, and October. Investors falling into this category are encouraged to seek guidance and explore available avenues.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims for investors of enCore. Contact James Wilson if you suffered significant losses.
news.summary: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have experienced substantial losses in enCore to reach out to him directly to explore potential options. If you have incurred significant losses in enCore stock or options and are interested in discussing your legal rights, Wilson encourages you to contact him for further assistance.

news.headline: 20/20 Onsite lauded with Safety Excellence Award by Whip Around, reinforcing commitment to clinical trial support.
news.summary: In Boston, 20/20 Onsite has been honored with the Safety Excellence Award from Whip Around.

news.headline: Nurse attacked at HCA Florida Palms West Hospital prompts Safewatch to announce significant action to address workplace assault.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on March 13, 2025, a nurse at HCA Florida Palms West Hospital was subjected to a violent attack, highlighting the critical necessity for enhanced safety protocols in various work environments, such as healthcare facilities, schools, and public institutions. This distressing event serves as a grim reminder of the risks faced by individuals in these settings. Such incidents exemplify the pressing need to address safety concerns, ensuring the protection of employees and visitors alike. Efforts to bolster security measures in these spaces are imperative to prevent similar occurrences in the future. This unfortunate incident has brought attention to the imperative of prioritizing safety, particularly in professions that are vulnerable to such threats. It serves as a stark reminder of the importance of implementing comprehensive safety strategies to safeguard individuals in their workplaces.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims for Pacira Investors. Contact Partner James Wilson if purchased securities between Aug 2, 2023 - Aug 8, 2024.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Pacira to reach out directly to him for a consultation regarding their options. If you bought or obtained securities in Pacira within the period of August 2, 2023 and August 8, 2024 and wish to further explore this matter, please do not hesitate to contact him.

news.headline: InventHelp inventor from Elgin, Illinois creates new product for tattooists & nail technicians - CHK-1046.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from Elgin, Illinois, expressed the need for an accessory that could efficiently blend tattoo ink. This innovation would ensure the creation of vibrant and precise tattoos. Additionally, the inventor suggested its potential use in nail salons to achieve seamless nail polish application. This idea aims to improve the quality of tattoos and nail designs, potentially benefiting artists and customers alike.

news.headline: Orion Corp. announcement of BlackRock, Inc. as a major shareholder disclosed under Securities Act.
news.summary: ORION CORPORATION STOCK EXCHANGE RELEASE: On March 13, 2025, at 16:45 EET, significant shareholder announcements were made. The details included updates on major shareholders and their respective stakes in the corporation. This disclosure marks a crucial development impacting the stock exchange. Shareholders with notable ownership percentages at Orion Corporation were highlighted during this release, signaling potential shifts in the company's ownership structure.

news.headline: TV host, actor, and author Karamo Brown named 2025 'Changemaker' by Parade for addressing pressing societal issues.
news.summary: In New York today, Parade, a renowned entertainment and lifestyle brand, recognized TV host, actor, and author Karamo Brown as one of the Changemakers 2025 honorees. This franchise highlights individuals who are dedicated to addressing current urgent challenges. The Parade Editorial Board will announce more honorees throughout the year. Brown was selected for his active engagement in bringing solutions to important issues.

news.headline: BioIVT reduced study times by at least 30% with IDBS E-WorkBook, enhancing efficiency significantly.
news.summary: In Woking, England, on March 13, 2025, BioIVT, a top provider of in vitro ADME research services, announced the successful conclusion of a partnership with IDBS to integrate the IDBS E-WorkBook platform. This collaboration has led to a notable decrease in study duration by a minimum of 30%. The initiative has allowed BioIVT to streamline its operations and enhance efficiency in conducting research.

news.headline: Farms, food banks caught off guard by spending cuts. Agriculture Department ends 2 programs, hurting farmers and families.
news.summary: The Agriculture Department has announced the discontinuation of two programs established during the Biden administration aimed at supporting farmers in providing food to schools and low-income families. This decision is part of a shift towards implementing more financially sustainable policies, highlighting a return to fiscal responsibility.

news.headline: Former Binance CEO Zhao: No talks of a Binance US deal with anyone.
Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for investors of Innovative Industrial Properties. Contact litigator for losses discussion.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who incurred losses in Innovative Industrial Properties to reach out to him for a consultation. If you bought or obtained securities in Innovative Industrial Properties between February, please contact him to explore your options.

news.headline: TGS in Oslo implemented ESPP for employees to purchase shares at 15% discount, with maximum purchase limit. Primary insiders received shares on March 7, 2025.
news.summary: Oslo, Norway - As of February 2019, TGS introduced an Employee Share Purchase Plan (ESPP) allowing eligible employees to buy TGS common shares at a discounted rate through payroll deductions. The ESPP functions in six-month cycles, permitting employees in eligible regions such as the United States, United Kingdom, and Canada, to acquire stock at a 15% markdown from the market price during purchase. A limit is established for the maximum shares an employee can buy in each six-month period, with ESPP dividends being reinvested in shares. On March 7, 2025, primary insiders benefited from the ESPP purchase. The share distribution among primary insiders is outlined in the attached schedule.

The Riflescopes market is expected to reach a value of $70.452 billion by 2032 with a CAGR of 4.8%. It includes analysis of military and commercial products, AI in Optics, and Micro-LED Arrays.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report on Riflescopes predicts a market value of US$70.452 billion by 2032, with a growth rate of 4.8% during 2024-2032. Telescopic sights have evolved into precise instruments with advanced features, aimed at enhancing accuracy. The report covers regional trends, end-user preferences, magnification levels, and evolving technologies in the Riflescope industry. This market forecast, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, highlights the continuous innovation in scopes, emphasizing their primary function of improving shooting accuracy.

news.headline: National Fuel Gas Company declares a 51.5 cents/ share dividend, payable on April 15, 2025, with 90.4 million shares in total.
news.summary: Today, in Williamsville, N.Y., the Board of Directors of National Fuel Gas Company (NYSE: NFG) announced the approval of a regular quarterly dividend of 51.5 cents per share for the company's common stock. This dividend is set to be paid out on April 15, 2025, to stockholders who are recorded as such by the end of business on March 31, 2025. With approximately 90.4 million shares of common stock currently in circulation, the Company confirms no existing preferred stock.

Senate Republican Leader Thune: I am waiting for US Senate Minority Leader Schumer to make an offer on stopgap votes.

SenesTech reported a 70% revenue growth in Q4 2024 to $501,000, gross profit margins of 61%, and reduction in operating expenses by 16%. They announced new initiatives to reduce expenses by $2 million annually to accelerate profitability. Management is positive about the company's progress.
news.summary: SenesTech, Inc. reported Q4 2024 financial results with revenue of $501,000, a 70% increase from Q4 2023, driven by e-commerce growth of 206%. The company's gross profit margin improved to 60.9%, and operating expenses decreased by 16%. Net loss was $1.3 million, while Adjusted EBITDA loss was $1.1 million. SenesTech raised over $2 million in the first quarter of 2025. Key growth initiatives included successful product launches and expansion in online and brick-and-mortar retail. The company announced operating optimization initiatives to reduce expenses by $2 million annually, aiming to achieve cash flow breakeven at approximately $7 million in revenue. CEO Joel Fruendt emphasized their path to profitability through cost efficiency and market disruption in rodent control. SenesTech's mission is sustainable pest management through fertility control products.

news.headline: HANZA AB acquires 100% shares of Leden Group Oy and purchases remaining 10% of Leden Estonia AS.
news.summary: On March 3, 2025, HANZA AB finalized the purchase of all shares from the Finnish company Leden Group Oy, acquiring a total of 100% ownership. Leden Group Oy was also the majority shareholder of Leden Estonia AS, holding around 90% of the shares. HANZA has now obtained the remaining shares of Leden Estonia AS, consolidating full ownership of the subsidiary.

news.headline: GRID partners with Getgud.io to enhance GRID Play with advanced game observability solutions. The first Technology Partner will be Getgud.io to improve in-game data extraction and management for competitive games.
news.summary: GRID, the leading intelligence engine in competitive gaming, has introduced Getgud.io as the inaugural Technology Partner of GRID Play, a specialized platform for extracting, distributing, and managing in-game data. This innovative solution offers structured post-game multiplayer data services, allowing developers to access valuable insights, monitor meta trends, generate leaderboards, access player statistics, and share data through public APIs.GRID Play aims to enhance the competitive gaming experience by providing comprehensive data infrastructure and analysis tools.

news.headline: Kahuna launches Kahuna Maui Mobile app for skills assessment in frontline workforce.
news.summary: In Houston, a new mobile app called Kahuna Maui Mobile has been launched by Kahuna for competency management. This app is designed to assess and enhance skills for frontline workers while they are on the job. This initiative aims to provide a convenient platform for skills development within the workflow.

news.headline: Addressable introduces CPW metric for Web3 marketing, emphasizing wallet activity. Wallet users 18x more likely to convert. Ethereum-based Etherealize targets institutional adoption on Ethereum rails.
news.summary: Addressable, a Web3 marketing firm, has introduced a new metric called cost per wallet (CPW) to enhance user acquisition tracking for DApps and blockchain businesses. CPW focuses on onchain wallet activity instead of traditional metrics like customer acquisition cost (CAC) or cost per click (CPC). The company claims CPW provides more precise insights, with users having a crypto wallet being 18 times more likely to sign up and seven times more likely to convert to crypto products. This metric helps in identifying high-value users and optimizing marketing efforts. CPW is seen as a more effective metric compared to CPC or cost per impression (CPM) as it distinguishes between high-intent users and low-quality traffic. The new metric could assist crypto projects in tracking user engagement in DeFi protocols, wallets, and exchanges. The broader crypto industry is also focusing on institutional adoption, with initiatives like Etherealize aiming to educate institutions about blockchain and Ether.

Law firm investigates Novo Nordisk investors' claims. Contact James Wilson if suffered losses between Nov 2, 2022 - Dec 19, 2024.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP specializing in Securities Litigation, is urging investors who experienced losses in Novo Nordisk to reach out to him for a consultation. If you bought or obtained securities in Novo Nordisk during the period of November 2, 2022, to December 19, 2024, and suffered losses, contact him directly to explore available options.

news.headline: Ounce of Hope introduces 4 THC seltzer flavors including Cherry Jane and Peach Buzz on shelves.
news.summary: In Memphis, Tennessee, on March 13, 2025, the top aquaponic cannabis company, Ounce of Hope, has confirmed its selection of four key THC-infused seltzer varieties. The recently introduced Cherry Jane and the popular Peach Buzz are part of the complete collection available for purchase, with all products now being sold, including the High Lime flavor.

news.headline: Perficient to exhibit AI-driven experiences and Marketo skills at Adobe Summit 2025, with ninth Women in Digital Breakfast.
news.summary: In Saint Louis, Perficient is set to showcase its comprehensive digital experience capabilities at Adobe Summit 2025, while also co-hosting the ninth edition of the Women in Digital Breakfast event.

news.headline: Smith + Howard introduces Business Office Services to help independent schools with operational inefficiencies and staffing gaps.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Smith + Howard, a prominent national firm specializing in tax, accounting, and advisory services, launched its new Business Office Services practice. This specialized offering aims to assist independent schools in tackling operational inefficiencies and staffing shortages.

news.headline: Inventor from Heath, Ohio creates a heated toilet seat cover for comfort and warmth. (CCT-5032) #innovation #invention
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from Heath, Ohio, shared his inspiration behind creating a unique toilet seat cover that prioritizes user comfort. The inventor expressed a desire to develop a heated toilet seat cover to ensure individuals feel warm and at ease while using the restroom. The innovative design aims to enhance the overall experience of sitting on a toilet seat by providing warmth. This invention introduces a new approach to toilet seat covers, offering users an added level of comfort and luxury during bathroom use.

news.headline: Hydrogen aircraft market to hit $590.6 billion by 2050, growing at 16.4% CAGR, driven by sustainable aviation and hydrogen tech advancements.
news.summary: The rise of the hydrogen aircraft sector is fueled by factors like the escalating focus on eco-friendly aviation, growing regulatory backing for emission-free air travel, and ongoing progress in hydrogen propulsion technology. As of March 13, 2025, in Wilmington, Del., the market for hydrogen aircraft is witnessing significant growth.

news.headline: Karrat Foundation and Arbitrum launch Studio Chain on Arbitrum for Web3 entertainment & gaming, featuring AMGI Studios & My Pet Hooligan.
news.summary: AMGI Studios, known for their acclaimed production My Pet Hooligan, will be the main attraction in a groundbreaking blockchain entertainment ecosystem. On March 13, 2025, Arbitrum Foundation and Karrat Foundation revealed their collaboration to introduce Studio Chain, a blockchain platform designed to elevate the entertainment industry. This partnership marks a significant development towards utilizing blockchain technology in entertainment. The headliner, My Pet Hooligan, is set to bring its award-winning status to the forefront of this innovative blockchain ecosystem. This strategic move is expected to transform the landscape for entertainment, drawing attention from industry professionals and audiences worldwide.

news.headline: Law firm investigating claims for investors of XPLR Infrastructure, LP (formerly NextEra Energy Partners, LP) with losses over $50,000. Contact James Wilson to discuss options.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced losses surpassing $50,000 in XPLR between January 26, 2021, and January 27, 2025, to reach out to him for a discussion about their potential courses of action.

The conference, which will take place in Washington, was first introduced in 2023 and has since...

news.headline: Enverus acquires Pearl Street Technologies to enhance grid reliability, addressing renewable energy interconnection challenges.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on March 13, 2025, Enverus, a reputable energy-focused SaaS company, revealed the acquisition of Pearl Street Technologies, a prominent firm specializing in addressing bottlenecks crucial for tackling interconnection challenges in renewable energy. This strategic move aims to enhance their capabilities and solidify their position in the industry. This acquisition signifies a significant step towards overcoming current hurdles in renewable energy, potentially leading to advancements in the sector's interconnection processes.

news.headline: Yiwugo.com, largest wholesale market in the world, showcases importance of digitalization in growing plush toy industry.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Yiwu, China, Yiwugo.com, the official online platform of the Yiwu Commodity Market, was highlighted as the world's biggest commodity wholesale market. China stands as the leading manufacturer of plush toys globally, and this market has shown consistent growth over recent years.

news.headline: Follett & Kortext merge to provide better digital learning materials for 1,000+ college campuses in North America.
news.summary: Kortext has introduced advanced digital learning features at Follett campuses to improve study tools effectiveness, enable better collaboration, and offer superior accessibility. This initiative was rolled out in Westchester, Illinois on March 13, 2025, as part of Follett Higher Education's endeavor to enhance student experience. Follett Higher Education, a prominent campus store operator in North America, caters to over 1,000 campuses across the region.

news.headline: Peoples Bancorp (Nasdaq: PEBK) authorizes $3.0M stock repurchase program with assets of $1.65B and equity of $130.6M.
news.summary: In Newton, North Carolina, on March 13, 2025, Peoples Bancorp of North Carolina, Inc. (Nasdaq: PEBK), which is the parent company of Peoples Bank located in Newton, NC, revealed that their Board of Directors has approved a stock repurchase plan. This program will see up to $3.0 million designated for repurchasing the company’s common stock. As of December 31, 2024, the Company reported assets totaling $1.65 billion and shareholders’ equity amounting to $130.6 million.
